_help: Per-whale payday reminders. Add with: node shift-downtime-monitor/payday.mjs add --name=<n> --model=<m> --payday=<Mon..Sun> [--handling=DO_NOT_SELL|PRE_SELL|SELL|REVIVE] [--fanId=<id>] [--note=<s>]. List with: payday.mjs list. The bot reads this on every run; changes show in the next shift reminder.

_fields.fanId: OnlyFans fan numeric id (optional but lets the bot match incoming buys/messages)
_fields.name: display name shown in the ping
_fields.model: creator account name (Marissa, Blue Bear, etc.)
_fields.payday: Mon | Tue | Wed | Thu | Fri | Sat | Sun
